description: This strategy identifies low volatility regimes using Bollinger Bandwidth. A long entry is triggered when bandwidth is in its lowest 20th percentile over a lookback period, signaling a contraction, and is confirmed by bullish momentum from the Stochastic RSI. The trade is exited when price touches the opposite Bollinger Band or a fixed 2:1 risk-reward target is hit, whichever comes first. The short logic is the mirror image.
notes: The 'bbands_bandwidth_percentile' is not a standard indicator. It must be calculated: 1) Compute Bollinger Bandwidth = (Upper Band - Lower Band) / Middle Band. 2) Calculate the rolling percentile rank of the current bandwidth value over the last 100 candles. Ensure the crossing conditions for Stochastic RSI are checked on the current candle only.
